race.description: Express Smash Repairs Super Maiden Plate
race.comment: COOL RUPERT (2) was poorly away and spotted the leaders a big start before working home into fourth when resuming over 1300m here last start. Trainer Matthew Smith tinkers with the gear. Nicely placed out to 1400m at this stage of the campaign and a big run is anticipated. CELLPHONE (1) led and gave a great sight but was bloused close to home at his latest appearance over 1550m at the Kensington track. Comes back in trip but shows good early dash so it shouldn't bother him. Progressing well and is up to winning a race like this. YESZEM (13) has been strong late in her two runs this time in work, the latest over 1300m here. Finds the ideal assignment third-up. SUR NOVA CENTAURI (5) is a UK import first-up from a 32-week break. Raced three times in the maiden campaign and was in the frame on each occasion. Looks to have settled in well and offers an X-factor to the race. MOVIE NIGHT (11) was competitive in town last prep and should go well at this level first-up.
